title: senecio helenitis
intro: Senecio helenitis, also known as Helen's pennyroyal or narrow-leaved fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Senecio helenitis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Senecio helenitis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe and calm the body.
